author: Jack Princz
name: Non-record: Byte-level transformer + JEPA auxiliary loss
blurb: 13-layer byte-level AR transformer (vocab 260, no tokenizer) with lightweight JEPA auxiliary loss (lambda_max=0.001, ~0.1% of gradient). Primary objective: next-byte CE. JEPA adds chunk-level latent prediction (8-byte chunks, 256d, SIGReg). LeakyReLU(0.5)², XSA last 4, EMA 0.997, Partial RoPE 16d, LN Scale. Int6+zstd-22. Sliding window stride=512, seq=4096.
